expectations.text: Output contains a Mermaid diagram block (```mermaid)
expectations.evidence: Sadece ASCII/text diyagram var (``` blokları), Mermaid syntax yok

expectations.text: Output defines at least 3 distinct networks or bridges (DMZ/web, app, DB)
expectations.evidence: Sadece 2 bridge: vmbr0 (WAN) ve vmbr1 (private LAN). App ve DB aynı subnet'te (10.0.1.0/24)

expectations.text: Output explicitly states DB is accessible only from app subnet (iptables DROP or similar)
expectations.evidence: UFW kurallarıyla DB'ye sadece App VM'den (10.0.1.20) 5432 izni verilmiş. iptables FORWARD ile değil, VM-level UFW ile yapılmış

expectations.text: Output includes iptables FORWARD chain rules
expectations.evidence: iptables -A FORWARD -i vmbr1 -o vmbr0 -j ACCEPT ve ESTABLISHED/RELATED kuralları mevcut

expectations.text: Output includes a subnet/network table with CIDR notation
expectations.evidence: Erişim Kuralları tablosu var, ve config'lerde 10.0.1.x/24 CIDR kullanılmış

expectations.text: networking.md file was actually written to outputs directory
